data.description: Trump on Iran: Will completely obliterate all of Iran's electric generating plants, oil wells, and Kharg Island if a deal is not reached

data.title: IPALCO Enterprises, Inc. Announces Extension of Expiration Time for Previously Announced Consent Solicitations
data.description: On March 30, 2026, IPALCO Enterprises, Inc. disclosed an extension of the expiration time for its Consent Solicitations. The company had initially set out to gather consents from stakeholders. This move marks a significant development in their ongoing efforts.

data.title: Ascensus Selected to Partner with ABLEnow Program, Completes Successful Platform Transition
data.description: Ascensus, the top independent technology and service provider for savings plans in the U.S., has recently incorporated the nation's biggest independent ABLE program. This addition has significantly expanded Ascensus' ABLE offerings to a total of 24 plans throughout the country. The company disclosed this information in Dresher, Pennsylvania on March 30, 2026, through a press release.

data.title: Precigen to Participate in a Fireside Chat with H.C. Wainwright on March 31
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Germantown, Maryland, Precigen, Inc. revealed that Helen Sabzevari, PhD, the President and CEO of the company, will be leading their efforts. Precigen, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol PGEN and is a company focused on developing advanced precision medicines to enhance patient outcomes. This announcement signifies a pivotal moment for the commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company in their mission to innovate and positively impact the lives of patients.

data.title: AES Announces Extension of Consent Solicitation for its 2028 Notes
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia, on March 30, 2026, the AES Corporation, listed as AES on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol AES, has revealed an extension on the deadline for its ongoing consent solicitation. This initiative is targeted at registered holders of its 5.450% Senior Notes.

data.title: STRONGER STARTS HERE: JOIN PLANET FITNESS TODAY FOR JUST ONE CENT DOWN AND $15 A MONTH
data.description: For a limited time until April 10, you can join the Classic Card membership at Planet Fitness for just one cent down and save at least $28. Planet Fitness, a leading fitness center franchise, currently has the highest number of members compared to any other fitness brand. This offer is available in Hampton, NH, and presents a great opportunity to save money and start your fitness journey.

data.title: M&T Bank Names Denise Viola Monahan as Regional President for Philadelphia and Southern New Jersey
data.description: Experienced banking executive, Denise Viola Monahan, has been appointed by M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB) to enhance client connections and promote the community-focused strategy in the Philadelphia and Southern New Jersey area. The announcement was made on March 30, 2026.

data.title: Pulsenmore Announces Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Webcast
data.description: Today at 8:30am ET, Pulsenmore Ltd. (NASDAQ: PLSM) (TASE: PLSM) will hold a conference call and webcast to discuss and provide a business update. The company, a leader in home ultrasound technology based in OMER, Israel, revealed its financial results for the latest period. The call will offer insights into the company's performance and future prospects.
Lakeland Fire + Safety finalizes sale of HPFR and HiViz line, expanding revenue by 15%.

data.title: Birchtech Expands Water Treatment Platform with SEA-IX™ Nuclear-Grade Ion Exchange Resin Line
data.description: A recently launched product line is aiming to capture a share of an estimated market worth between $185 million and $255 million. The targeted sectors for this new line include nuclear power, coal-fired utilities, and municipal water treatment.

data.title: SeaStar Medical Showcases New Positive Data from the QUELIMMUNE SAVE Registry and an Analysis of the Unique Immunomodulatory Mechanism of the SCD Therapy at AKI & CRRT 2026
data.description: Data from pediatric patients included in the SAVE Registry revealed no device-related adverse events or need for immunosuppression. Additionally, the survival data remained robust.

data.title: Hakluyt records another year of strong growth driven by value of human insights, expertise and experience
data.description: In London on March 30, 2026, Hakluyt, a global strategic advisory firm serving top corporations and investors, reported significant growth for the year ending on June 30, 2025. This growth signals the firm's ongoing commitment to investing in its exceptional team of advisors.

data.title: Giftify’s CardCash Reports 14.2% Sell-Side Volume Growth and 18.5% Rise in New Seller Acquisition Through Early Q1 2026, Expanding Platform Supply Base
data.description: In the period between January 1 and March 15, a total of 70,954 sell orders were processed, marking a 14.2% increase compared to the previous year. Additionally, 25,508 new sellers joined the platform in the first quarter of 2026, reflecting an 18.5% increase from the previous year. This surge in activity comes as CardCash boosts its marketplace inventory in anticipation of heightened demand during the upcoming spring season.

data.title: Turbo Energy Expects to Report 130%–140% Revenue Growth, Reaching $22.5 – $23.5 Million in 2025 Based on Preliminary Unaudited Results
data.description: The company is making progress in its shift towards becoming an AI-powered intelligent energy platform and has outlined its projections for 2026. The transformation will involve incorporating artificial intelligence to enhance its energy services. The company is looking ahead to 2026 as a key milestone in this strategic evolution, indicating their commitment to modernizing their operations.

data.title: CERo Therapeutics Doses Second Patient in Cohort 2 of Phase 1 CER-1236 Trial
data.description: The trial is progressing with continuous monitoring of safety and pharmacological effects, with intentions to expand into Myelodysplastic Syndromes (MDS) and Myelofibrosis (MF). The study will involve increasing the sample size to include more participants.

data.title: Eva Live Inc. Engages Anderson Kill P.C. to Execute Nasdaq Tokenization Strategy for GOAI
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Las Vegas, NV, Eva Live Inc. (NASDAQ: GOAI), a rapidly expanding company specializing in AI-driven digital advertising and marketing technology, revealed its collaboration with Anderson Kill P.C. to advance the implementation of a strategic plan. This initiative aims to align GOAI with Nasdaq's recent tokenization framework. Heading the Anderson Kill P.C. team is Louis L. Nock, a Shareholder and former New York State Supreme Court Justice known for his focus on the evolving legal, regulatory, and corporate dimensions of Digital Assets and Blockchain Technology.
